title: Global MEG Supply–Demand Outlook (2020–2026)
description: A comprehensive analysis of global monoethylene glycol supply, demand, operating rates, and regional trade flows, including China coal-to-EO dynamics and Middle East competitiveness.

title: Ethylene Oxide Cost Curve Benchmarking (North America vs. Middle East vs. Asia)
description: A benchmarking study comparing EO production costs across major regions, including feedstock sensitivity, energy intensity, and integrated EO/EG economics.

title: Ethylene Glycol Market Drivers and Price Trends (2019–2025)
description: A review of global EG pricing, margin cycles, PET demand growth, and the impact of new capacity additions on long‑term price floors.

title: Process Safety Lessons from EO/EG Incidents (Technical Review)
description: A technical summary of key process safety learnings from historical EO/EG plant incidents, focusing on runaway reactions, vent sizing, and oxidizer management.

title: Energy Transition Impacts on Petrochemical Feedstocks
description: An assessment of how electrification, refinery rationalization, and renewable fuels policies are reshaping NGL and naphtha availability for petrochemical producers.

title: North American Natural Gas & NGL Outlook for Chemical Producers
description: A forward-looking view of natural gas, ethane, propane, and butane fundamentals and their implications for U.S. petrochemical competitiveness.

title: Carbon Intensity Benchmarking for EO/EG Production Routes
description: A comparison of carbon intensity across steam cracking, coal-to-EO, and methanol-to-olefins pathways, including abatement options and cost impacts.
